body.purpose: Readable LP analysis, reports, and UI prose.

label.purpose: Phase strips, tabs, chips, and provenance stamps.

shadows.name: atrium-lift
shadows.purpose: Large modal or hero media only.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Deep-pine venue action for primary flows.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #073d32; color: #fbfeff; border: 1px solid #073d32; border-radius: 6px; padding: 14px 22px; font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgb(17 24 23 / 0.08); background: #052f28; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #073d32; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #fbfeff; color: #073d32; border: 1px solid rgb(7 61 50 / 0.28); border-radius: 6px; padding: 14px 22px; font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #073d32; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgb(17 24 23 / 0.08); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #073d32; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Atrium Card
components.description: Crisp white diagnostic surface on pale-blue glass.
components.html:
VERIFIED

Fee APR traces to source

Every number keeps its provenance label and stays readable on the bright venue surface.
components.css: .ds-card-atrium { background: #fbfeff; color: #111817; border: 1px solid rgb(7 61 50 / 0.14); border-radius: 8px; padding: 24px; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: none; max-width: 340px; } .ds-card-atrium:hover { box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgb(17 24 23 / 0.08); } .ds-card-atrium h3 { margin: 8px 0 8px; color: #073d32; font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 24px; line-height: 1.1; } .ds-card-atrium p { margin: 0; color: #556967; line-height: 1.55; } .ds-card-kicker { color: #073d32 !important; font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Phase Chip
components.description: Uppercase phase marker with gold registration tick.
components.css: .ds-chip-phase { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #eef8fb; color: #073d32; border: 1px solid rgb(143 201 222 / 0.55); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 8px 14px; font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-chip-phase span { width: 8px; height: 8px; background: #f2a900; display: inline-block; }

components.name: Sponsor Lockup Row
components.description: Poster-style partner or provenance row with thin rules.
components.css: .ds-sponsor-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr; align-items: center; gap: 28px; color: #111817; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-sponsor-row span { height: 1px; background: rgb(17 24 23 / 0.55); } .ds-sponsor-row strong { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap; }

narrative.overview: LP Guardian now borrows from the supplied Turing Test Hackathon poster: an overexposed glass atrium, pale cyan vertical beams, black sponsor marks, and monumental dark-green type. The UI should feel like a premium hackathon title card projected onto frosted architectural glass, not a comic poster, not a terminal, not fintech navy.
keyCharacteristics: Icy light surface with translucent vertical beam fields.
Massive condensed all-caps headlines in deep pine green.
Thin divider lines and strict logo-grid rhythm.
Minimal shadows, mostly atmospheric blur from background imagery.
Black, pine, and sponsor-gray text on pale cyan glass.
Small bybit-gold accent only for phase ticks, separators, and active state marks.

rules.name: The Frosted Venue Rule
rules.body: Backgrounds must stay light and cold. Dark mode is prohibited for the main redesign.

rules.name: The Gold Is A Pin Rule
rules.body: Gold is a registration mark, not a theme. Never use it for large fills, gradients, or hero text.

rules.name: The Beam Rule
rules.body: Use vertical translucent blue fields for atmosphere. Do not use radial glows, blobs, or purple-blue gradients.

rules.name: The Poster Scale Rule
rules.body: If a landing headline is not uncomfortable at first, it is too small. Let display type dominate the first viewport.

rules.name: The No Negative Tracking Rule
rules.body: Letter spacing is never negative. The reference image feels engineered, not squeezed.

rules.name: The No Comic Shadow Rule
rules.body: Hard offset shadows from the previous visual system are forbidden.

rules.name: The One Hairline Rule
rules.body: Dividers use 1px ink or deep-pine at low opacity. Never use thick side-stripe borders.

dos: Do use the supplied image as atmosphere: icy atrium background, vertical beams, deep-green display type, thin sponsor rules.
Do keep every honesty label visible and textual: VERIFIED, COMPUTED, ESTIMATED, EMULATED, LABELED.
Do cap body lines at 70ch and keep diagnostic tables dense but airy.
Do use 1px dividers to organize sponsor-like grids, report metadata, and phase sections.
Do use Atrium White cards on Atrium Fog backgrounds for product surfaces.
Do preserve TODO(arch) and TODO(robinhood) honesty in copy and code comments.
donts: Don't use the previous royal-blue, electric-lime, thick black outline, cyan mascot system.
Don't use SaaS-cream dashboards (Notion, Linear, Vercel-style white-on-white).
Don't use generic dark terminal aesthetic.
Don't use glassmorphism decorative blurs. Background can be luminous; cards must stay crisp.
Don't use hero-metric template: big number, small label, supporting stats, gradient accent.
Don't use identical card grids with icon, heading, and three lines of text.
Don't use side-stripe borders, gradient text, radial blobs, purple glows, or heavy comic shadows.
